commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f557e422f305bea3c35c808c0718dc0a80fa2284)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a SkillRouter registry/API, `skills.router` config schema, prompt-state plumbing, embedded-runner pre-routing, SDK exports, and focused tests for skills prompt filtering and raw-run suppression.

PR surface: Source +235, Tests +129. Total +364 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR, not a reported current-main bug. The changed behavior is source-reviewable in the diff, but the submitted proof is unit-test/local-check coverage rather than a real configured router run.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human maintainer API/config-contract judgment and contributor real behavior proof rather than a narrow automated repair.

target.title: feat(skills): add SkillRouter abstraction for pre-routing
target.body:
## Summary

- Introduces a pluggable `SkillRouter` interface that allows plugins to pre-filter skills before the system prompt is built
- When a router is configured and matches, the narrowed result replaces the full `<available_skills>` catalog in the system prompt, protecting prefix cache
- Core only defines the protocol; it does not bind to any routing strategy
- Aligns router candidates with the same prompt-visible skill state used for the catalog, so disabled skills and agent skill filters cannot leak into routing
- Skips skill routing for raw model runs (`modelRun: true` / `promptMode: "none"`)

This is a draft implementation of the [SkillRouter Abstraction Layer Proposal](https://github.com/lanzhi-lee/openclaw/blob/self/skill-router-abstraction/xiaomi/proposal/skill-router-abstraction-proposal-en.md).

## Design

**Router interface** (`router-types.ts`):
```typescript
interface SkillRouter {
  readonly name: string;
  route(query: string, candidates: SkillForPrompt[]): Promise<SkillRouteResult>;
}
```

**4-way return** (`router-integration.ts`):
- `{ xml, mode }` — valid match, inject into user prompt
- `{ mode: "nomatch" }` — router said no skill applies, suppress full catalog
- `{ error, reason }` — router failed, fall back to full catalog
- `undefined` — no router configured, use full catalog as-is

**Plugin registration** (`router-registry.ts`):
```typescript
registerSkillRouter("my-router", (config) => new MyRouter(config));
```

**Configuration**:
```json
{ "skills": { "router": { "name": "my-router", "config": {} } } }
```

## Files Changed

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `router-types.ts` | SkillRouter interface, SkillRouteResult discriminated union |
| `router-registry.ts` | registerSkillRouter / resolveSkillRouter |
| `router-integration.ts` | Pure resolveSkillRoute with 4-way return; candidates now come from prompt-visible resolved skills only |
| `attempt.ts` | Pre-routing + prompt injection with error fallback; raw model runs skip routing |
| `skill-contract.ts` | SkillForPrompt type, widened formatSkillsForPrompt |
| `workspace.ts` | Shared prompt state helper returning both prompt and filtered resolved skills |
| `types.skills.ts` | router config in SkillsConfig |
| `skills-runtime.ts` | plugin-sdk exports |

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/skills.resolveskillspromptforrun.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts` — 3 files passed, 114 tests passed
- `git diff --check` — passed
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` — clean, no accepted/actionable findings

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: router candidate selection now matches the same filtered skill set shown in `<available_skills>`, and raw model probe runs do not invoke skill routing.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout with focused Vitest coverage.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/skills.resolveskillspromptforrun.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts`; `git diff --check`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`.

Evidence after fix: focused tests cover snapshot state, entries fallback, hidden skill filtering, agent skill filters, and raw-run routing suppression.

Observed result after fix: Vitest reported 3 passed files / 114 passed tests; diff check passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

What was not tested: no live plugin-provided router implementation yet; short-prompt routing with bounded recent conversation context remains a design follow-up.

## Next Steps

- [ ] Community alignment on the abstraction design
- [ ] Implement a reference router (e.g., token matching, keyword-based)
- [ ] Add router diagnostic events
- [ ] Document plugin integration guide and refresh plugin SDK API baseline before merge
- [ ] Design bounded routing context for short prompts, using current prompt plus a small sanitized recent conversation window
target.author: lanzhi-lee
